message:
Running command: 
# Check info.log for context on what happened
echo "=== Last 40 lines of info.log ==="
tail -40 "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/info.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== PDK root contents ==="
ls /nc/apps/pdk/ 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Check ciel and sky130A availability ==="
ls /nc/apps/pdk/sky130A 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "sky130A not at /nc/apps/pdk/"
ls /home/user/.ciel 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "No ~/.ciel"
